message: Jake
Yuriko
Cindy
Welcome back
Pfft, hee hee hee hee
W-what's with you suddenly laughing like that?
Weeeelcome back!
S,
Hehe, I came to play!
Look
Talk

It feels like the tension in the room has thickened.
In the office, which is just as usual,
I can't help but be impressed that just having one person here changes the atmosphere.
Now's not the time for that.
is standing there looking puzzled.
is leaning on my desk, staring at me intently.
It's a bit embarrassing.
There’s a chair for visitors, but she’s smiling at me.
is staring at me, concerned.
is still facing the computer, but the keys are being typed by
to transcribe the conversation with.
She’s focused intently on her computer, doing something. Her stillness makes her look like a statue.
I understand it’s confusing to hear something like this all of a sudden. But,
she’s the birth mother, right?
That’s right.
Right now,
I don’t know what to say.
Can you get in touch with me once you’ve calmed down?
I’m living with Tim now. I’m in apartment 408 by the mural on Avenue B.
Got it, I'll come visit.
Then,
you seemed shocked.
I might have picked the wrong time to say that.
What’s done is done, though. I’m sure Tim will comfort and support you.
I hope so.
I need to head back soon or Tim will start worrying.
Just a moment.
Um, so, what if, hypothetically, Ariana has a birth parent?
What do you mean by that?
Actually, someone asked me to find a daughter they put up for adoption.
The daughter’s name is Ariana, and her foster parent is Kleiberg.
Are you saying that?
It’s me!? Are you talking about me?
Thank you so much. I wouldn't have found the hideout without that.
What’s going on today? More importantly,
how did you figure out this place?
Hehe.
You’re all-seeing. And, I came today to thank you for the other day.
Thank you?
Yes, you caught Gloria at FLIX, didn’t you?
That really helped me out a lot, hehe.
The birth mother is,
what does that mean?
What do you plan to do about work?
Hmm,
well,
I'm thinking it's okay to just give up since the entertainment world doesn't really attract me.
Then what about movies?
Movies? I wanted to try being an actress,
but I feel that living normally with Tim is more important.
So you prioritize your boyfriend over work?
Isn't it nice to be pretty only in front of someone you love?
I have no lingering feelings for work anymore.
You're so nonchalant about it?
I think it was great to have done such a special job, but it was also pretty tough.
Right now, I just want to live a normal life.
I feel bad for Director Fabar.
Wasn't my mom dead?
You see, Tim is,
my only lover, my big brother, and my dad and mom all in one.
Isn't that a heavy burden for Tim?
It’s fine, for sure.
It’s been like that since the orphanage.
I was at Queens Orphanage with Tim after my parents died in a car accident.
By the way, your real name is,
Ariana Kleiberg. It’s a sad situation because I lost my parents before I could even remember their faces.
After all,
I was Meryl's daughter.
What’s wrong? You look surprised.
I don’t need your sympathy; I’ve overcome that.
It’s okay, I’ve been living just fine as an orphan. Hehe.
I’ve managed to live alone until now.
Forget about Gloria.”
Let’s talk about something else.
Why? I think Gloria was worried about you.
She
Actually, I'm not good at it. She took great care of me, but I feel like I've already let her earn enough.
Gloria is not really normal. She gets really angry just talking normally with the male co-star.
That's all.
Isn't that because it’s important?
Oh, you’re really backing Gloria! Could it be that kind of thing is your hobby?
J-just kidding, right? I'm the one who's disliked.
It's okay, she hates all men.
Right now, just thinking about being out of her sight makes me happy.
Ah, being free is the best happiness!
I can't believe anything.
Have you been in touch with Guy?
Why are you asking that?
With Guy.
Didn't you know that the article about him and her being in a hot love affair was in BAM?
What’s that? I had no idea about that story at all. Besides,
she only loves Tim.
I can't believe there's some weird misunderstanding spreading around. I don't know anything about Guy.
Then why did that article come out?
It's weird that such an article was released and Gloria said nothing.
Maybe Gloria is involved somehow.
That’s kind of unsettling; I hope Tim doesn’t know.
What on earth does that mean? I can’t think straight.
What was the article about and when was it circulating?
Just a few weeks ago.
She had a series in BAM right until just before she left.
So, what was the content?
It was originally an article about Guy, starting with the breakup of his engagement.
It developed into reports about a love affair.
Wait a minute! What’s that about?
Why are they allowing such an article to spread!?
That article is complete nonsense, you know? I wonder what Gloria, who's being rude, is really thinking.
That's definitely true. Gloria is going all out to make sure your scandal doesn't see the light of day.
Wait, does that really mean Gloria knew?
But honestly, I can't think of any other possibility.
I started to feel a bit down.
